title: Cyient Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Cyient Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Cyient Capital India in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
